programs.desc: Rosemary chicken; grilled polenta and porcini tomato sauce; happy cow burgers; old school coleslaw; corn on the cob.

programs.sub_title: Sticky Squid Balls and Sausage Fusilli
programs.desc: Jamie cooks sticky squid balls, grilled prawns and noodle broth, plus sausage fusilli and creamy garden salad.

programs.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programs.sub_title: Feel the Fear and Do It Anyways
programs.desc: Teams head to Canmore, Alta., where they must race the rapids before hitting the ranch for a test of skill and stamina.

programs.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programs.desc: Stuart is looking for a serene, scenic retreat in Wanaka, where the breathtaking landscapes provide a backdrop for an adventure-filled, yet tranquil lifestyle.

programs.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programs.desc: Aileen and Constance embark on a search in Rotorua for a culturally rich home, where the marvels of geothermal wonders and Maori heritage create a unique living experience.

programs.title: Next Level Chef
programs.desc: The top 15 chefs are drafted into their three teams; the contestants must prepare an all-American smash burger that proves their cooking abilities.
